title: Your adventure

zoneDesc.forest: Every journey starts here. The air smells of pine and possibility.
zoneDesc.mountain: The climb reveals what you're made of. Trust your legs.
zoneDesc.cave: Darkness before light. Every habit kept is a torch lit.
zoneDesc.volcano: Raw energy, barely contained. Channel it or be consumed.
zoneDesc.temple: Silence teaches what noise cannot. Discipline runs deep here.
zoneDesc.city: Surrounded by temptation — and still you hold. Remarkable.
zoneDesc.castle: The final walls before the summit. Your will is iron.
zoneDesc.summit: This is where legends stand. Few make it this far.
zoneDesc.plains: Wide open days. Build the rhythm now before the terrain rises.
zoneDesc.hills: The ground rises. So do you. Each step counts double.
zoneDesc.gorge: Deep cuts forge deep strength. The hardest stretch is now.
zoneDesc.highlands: Altitude is earned, not given. The air is thinner up here.
zoneDesc.ridge: Narrow path, wide view. Eyes forward — almost there.
zoneDesc.glacier: Cold, still, and unstoppable. Just like you.
zoneDesc.desert: The cravings are fierce here. Your discipline is your water.
zoneDesc.oasis: A moment of relief — don't mistake comfort for permission to stop.
zoneDesc.dunes: Shifting ground. You adapt, or you don't. You adapt.
zoneDesc.mesa: Wide plateau, wide view. The hardest days are behind you now.
zoneDesc.canyon: Echoes of past choices surround you. Make the right one today.
zoneDesc.spire: One final climb. Everything you have, all at once.
zoneDesc.zenith: You reached the peak of the Cut. Remember this feeling.
zoneDesc.sanctum: The mind is the first battlefield. Begin here.
zoneDesc.labyrinth: Every wrong turn teaches something. Keep moving.
zoneDesc.abyss: The Void stares back. You do not blink.
zoneDesc.dreamscape: Even in dreams, your discipline holds.
zoneDesc.void_edge: The line between who you were and who you are. Cross it.
zoneDesc.mindscape: This is where the final version of you lives. Step inside.
zoneDesc.astral: Beyond form, beyond habit — this is pure will.
zoneDesc.transcendence: You made it. 60 days. The Void is silent.

help.title: How to advance
help.step1: Complete your main mission to move one step forward.
help.step2: Every few steps you cross into a new zone of the world.
help.step3: Reach the end and defeat the boss to clear the season.

chestNew: New gear unlocked! Equip it on your hero in the Hero tab.
